mapper.sql:
a.id,
a.app_id,
a.name,
a.dept_id,
d.dept_name,
a.owner_user_id,
a.remark,
a.is_deleted,
a.status,
u.real_name AS owner_real_name
mapper.select:
select
from apps a
left join departments d on a.dept_id = d.id and d.is_deleted = 0
left join users u on a.owner_user_id = u.id and u.is_deleted = 0
where a.is_deleted = 0
and ( a.app_id like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or a.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or d.dept_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or u.real_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
order by a.id desc

select
from apps a
left join departments d on a.dept_id = d.id and d.is_deleted = 0
left join users u on a.owner_user_id = u.id and u.is_deleted = 0
where a.id = #{id} and a.is_deleted = 0
select count(1) from apps where app_id = #{appId}
mapper.insert:
insert into apps(app_id, name, dept_id, owner_user_id, remark, status, is_deleted)
values(#{appId}, #{name}, #{deptId}, #{ownerUserId}, #{remark}, 'ENABLED', 0)
mapper.update:
update apps
set name = #{name},
dept_id = #{deptId},
owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId},
remark = #{remark}
where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0

update apps
set is_deleted = 1,
updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select count(1) from app_credentials where app_id = #{appId}
select count(1) from app_model_permissions where app_id = #{appId}
select count(1) from apps where dept_id = #{deptId} and is_deleted = 0
